name: Agent Well-Known Readiness Audit
paid: Audit an agent/API origin for well-known discovery, x402 pricing, OpenAPI/MCP readiness, and install blockers before an agent integrates it.
friction: Buyer needs an x402-capable HTTP client/wallet only for paid backend calls; free discovery probes work with plain fetch/curl.
